first_run.rationale: The score is identical (7/10), and the reasoning across both evaluations is substantively the same. Both versions praise the candidate's extensive technical experience and entrepreneurial spirit while consistently noting a lack of specific, high-level AI/cloud strategy experience and a formal advanced degree in AI. The change in dates, implying an older candidate, did not negatively impact the assessment or introduce new, age-related concerns. The minor differences in wording are consistent with normal run-to-run variation.
